provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, balanced throwing dagger, slim symmetrical double-edged blade tapering to a fine point, minimal cross-guard, cord-wrapped handle with no pommel for clean release, the blade is polished steel with a bright central ridge, compact proportions showing it is meant for throwing not fighting
provenance.negative_prompt: blurry, text, letters, runes, watermark, signature, 3d render, ambient occlusion, photorealistic, photograph, multiple items, two objects, cropped, cut off, pixel art, cel-shaded, flat shading, neon colors, gradient background, white background, light background, modern, sci-fi, futuristic, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, frame, border, vignette

judgment.explanation: Large ornate dagger, good execution, but proportions are too large — reads as a short sword not a throwing dagger. Scale violates FRM-002 intent.
